column1: # HDIC is an abbreviation of the Integrated Database of Hanzi Dictionaries in Early Japan
# Ruiju myogishō 類聚名義抄, Kanchi’in copy 観智院本, reorganized edition 改編本.
# anonymous Buddhist monk, the latter half of the 12th century.
# Copyright (c) 2022-2025 HDIC project, IKEDA Shoju (Chair, Professor Emeritus, Hokkaido University)
# Research group of Linguistics, Hokkaido University Faculty of Humanities and Human Siences
# North 10, West 7, Kita-ku Sapporo, Hokkaido, 060-0810 Japan
# Data License Information and Access Rights
# Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License (CC BY-SA 4.0)
#   KR2ID             Kazama edition item ID number, K, Book(ww), page(xxx),line(y) and column(zz), in the case of plural items appeared in column, entry rankings are also recorded as 1,2,…,n.

#   KRID              Kazama edition entry ID number, K, Book(ww), page(xxx),line(y) and column(zz), in occasion of the headword with single character form, entry ranking is recorded as 0. While, in occasion of the headword with plural character form, entry rankings are recorded as 1,2,…,n. Moreover, in the case of plural items appeared in column, entry rankings are also recorded as 1,2,…,n.
#   KR_Tenri_p        Tenri editon item ID number, T, volume(a/b/c), page(xxx),line(y) and column(zz)
#   KR_vol_name       Volume name, from 仏上 to 僧下
#   KR_radical        Radical name, from 人 to 雑
#   KR_vol_radical    Volune and radical number, from v1#1(第1帖第1) to v10#120(第10帖第120)
#   Def               Definition of pronunciation, meaning and variant(s)
#   正宗索引: 正宗敦夫編『類聚名義抄 仮名索引』日本古典全集刊行会，1939-1940
#   望月和訓集成: 望月郁子編『類聚名義抄：四種声点付和訓集成』(笠間索引叢刊44)笠間書院，1974
#   草川和訓集成: 草川昇編『五本対照類聚名義抄和訓集成』汲古書院，2000
#   西端誤写考察: 西端幸雄「類聚名義抄における誤写の考察」『訓点語と訓点資料』45，1971
#   西端誤写諸例: 西端幸雄「類聚名義抄における誤写の諸例」『訓点語と訓点資料』52，1973
# We are grateful to Tenri Central Library and Yagi Shoten for permission to publish the decipherment text of KRM.

column11: 音仁(L")「ニン」　ヒト(HL)　ワレ(LL)　サネ　マホル　ユク

column12: 高山寺本になし。岡田研究183頁。
高山寺本は次項に「人魚　イヲノナ」あり。高山寺本が観智院本より以前である説の反例（岡田研究182頁）。池田按：蓮成院本は「分註式」で「人魚」あり。
